title: Mustardy Vietnamese Bacon Bun Rieu
description: A nostalgic Vietnamese dish featuring crispy bacon lardon, slow-cooked sweet and sour tamarind broth, and a hint of spicy mustard. This recipe serves a raw-friendly version of the traditional bun rieu, where fish balls are swapped with crunchy pork lardons.

ingredients.name: Pork lardons
ingredients.notes: about 1 cup of diced and smoked bacon

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the pork lardons and cook until they are crispy and golden brown, about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger, and cook for 2 minutes, until the onion is translucent.
Add the tamarind paste, fish sauce, and mustard, and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
